case_title: AMBROSE ACHUA VS. LYFT TRANSPORTATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACHUA, AMBROSE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT TRANSPORTATION, INC.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACHUA, AMBROSE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT TRANSPORTATION, INC. CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-05-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
FILED LETTER FROM LYFT TRANSPORTATION, INC. STATING THAT THEY ARE NOT THE CORRECT DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AMBROSE ACHUA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ACHUA, AMBROSE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT TRANSPORTATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
